Melisa Yüksel graduated from İstanbul Üniversitesi Hukuk Fakültesi (Istanbul University Faculty of Law) with honors in 2024.

She is currently continuing her thesis-based Master’s program in Private Law at the İstanbul Üniversitesi Sosyal Bilimler Enstitüsü (Istanbul University Institute of Social Sciences). She works as a research assistant in the Civil Law Department within the university.
